meaning: 雷德布里奇[英国英格兰东南部城市]
examples: On Monday I was at the Redbridge E-ACT Free School in east London.
Redbridge Council's cabinet agreed Tuesday night to a ban on placing children with foster carers who smoke unless there are exceptional circumstances.
Redbridge primaries are so oversubscribed that the proportion of parents unhappy with the place offered to their child is among the highest in England;
Ms Konye, of Throckmorton Road, Canning Town, will appear before Redbridge Magistrates' Court on Wednesday.
Five people, including four charged with murder, appeared at Redbridge Magistrates' Court on Thursday.
